## Task 1: Fix wave-9-agent-1-bug-1 -- WeaponLootRegistrar.kt MOD_VERSION_STRING Stonecutter 0.6 syntax
**File:** src/main/kotlin/com/dndweapons/loot/WeaponLootRegistrar.kt
**From bugs:** wave-9-agent-1-bug-1 (severity P0, category broken_existing), wave-9-agent-1-bug-2 (severity P0, category missing_requirement) -- bug-2 is a downstream consequence of this build failure; fixing this unblocks Task 2.

### Acceptance criteria
- The `MOD_VERSION_STRING` constant at line 44 uses valid Stonecutter 0.6 else-ladder syntax with each directive on its own line.
- `./gradlew chiseledBuild` exits with BUILD SUCCESSFUL on all 5 MC versions: 1.20.1, 1.21.1, 1.21.4, 1.21.11, 26.1.2.
- No other logic in WeaponLootRegistrar.kt is changed -- only the MOD_VERSION_STRING stonecutter block is touched.
- Commit with message `phase 5 fix: correct Stonecutter 0.6 else-ladder for MOD_VERSION_STRING`

### Context
Current broken code at WeaponLootRegistrar.kt:44:
```kotlin
private const val MOD_VERSION_STRING: String =
    //? if >=1.21.11 { /*"1.21.11"*///?}
    //? if (>=1.21.4) & (<1.21.11) { /*"1.21.4"*///?}
    //? if (>=1.21.1) & (<1.21.4) { /*"1.21.1"*///?}
    //? if <1.21.1 {
    "1.20.1"
    //?}
```

Replace with this valid Stonecutter 0.6 else-ladder:
```kotlin
private const val MOD_VERSION_STRING: String =
    //? if >=1.21.11 {
    /*"1.21.11"*/
    //?} else if (>=1.21.4) & (<1.21.11) {
    /*"1.21.4"*/
    //?} else if (>=1.21.1) & (<1.21.4) {
    /*"1.21.1"*/
    //?} else {
    "1.20.1"
    //?}
```

The combined `/*value*///?}` token on a single line is not valid Stonecutter 0.6. Each branch must have: opening directive on its own line, block-comment value on the next line, then `//?}` (or `//?} else if ...`) on its own line.

## Task 2: Re-run verification matrix and update phase-5-verification-final.md
**File:** docs/superpowers/plans/phase-5-verification-final.md
**From bug:** wave-9-agent-1-bug-2 (severity P0, category missing_requirement)
**Depends on:** Task 1 (must be in a later wave -- do not run until Task 1 build succeeds)

### Acceptance criteria
- Run `./gradlew chiseledBuild` on all 5 MC versions and confirm BUILD SUCCESSFUL for each.
- Run `./gradlew chiseledTest` on all 5 MC versions and confirm all JUnit tests pass, including the 7 new AcquisitionCatalogTest tests.
- Run `./gradlew chiseledRunGametest` on all 5 MC versions and confirm 16/16 gametests pass per version.
- Update the verification matrix in phase-5-verification-final.md with actual results (GREEN or FAIL per cell).
- If all 5 versions are GREEN across all 3 columns: set Status to GREEN, apply git tag `phase-5-acquisition`, and push.
- If any version is RED: set Status to HOLD, leave tag unapplied, document the failure in the Known Issues section.
- Commit with message `phase 5: final verification doc`

### Context
The verification matrix was recorded as all-FAIL / NOT RUN because the Stonecutter parse error in WeaponLootRegistrar.kt blocked every build:
```
| 1.20.1  | FAIL (parse error) | NOT RUN | NOT RUN |
| 1.21.1  | FAIL (parse error) | NOT RUN | NOT RUN |
| 1.21.4  | FAIL (parse error) | NOT RUN | NOT RUN |
| 1.21.11 | FAIL (parse error) | NOT RUN | NOT RUN |
| 26.1.2  | FAIL (parse error) | NOT RUN | NOT RUN |
```

After Task 1 is complete, re-run the full three-command sequence per version:
```
./gradlew chiseledBuild
./gradlew chiseledTest
./gradlew chiseledRunGametest
```

GREEN decision criteria: chiseledBuild exits 0, chiseledTest reports 0 failures (must include the 7 AcquisitionCatalogTest assertions), chiseledRunGametest reports 16/16 pass.
HOLD decision criteria: any non-zero exit, any test failure, or fewer than 16 gametests reported.
